overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a horse-drawn stagecoach moving through a historic Western town. The camera orbits around the red 'DAVIS OVERLAND DESPATCH CO' carriage as it travels along cobblestone streets with tram tracks, passing wooden buildings and telegraph poles in clear morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street with tram tracks in historic western town

events.description: carriage begins moving forward from stationary position facing the horses

agents.ego_description: starting the horse-drawn carriage and beginning to move along the cobblestone street

notable_agents.action: two draft horses with white markings harnessed to the carriage, beginning to walk forward

entered.detail: black and brown draft horses with white facial markings and feathered hooves
dark wooden building with covered platform and waiting bench
metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street surface
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close frontal view of two draft horses harnessed to a carriage on a cobblestone street. The wooden station building lines the left side with a bench on the platform. As the carriage begins to move forward, the horses start walking and the camera tracks with them, revealing the tram tracks and telegraph poles extending into the distance.

events.description: carriage body blocks view of the horses as camera moves to side view

agents.ego_description: driving the carriage forward through the town center, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: red stagecoach with 'DAVIS OVERLAND DESPATCH CO' lettering, gold decorative trim, and large wooden wheels

segments.scene_description: The camera circles to the side of the moving carriage, revealing the ornate red 'DAVIS OVERLAND DESPATCH CO' stagecoach with gold lettering and decorative details. The horses become occluded by the carriage body as the camera tracks alongside. The wooden station building recedes into the background while the cobblestone street and tram tracks continue forward.

events.description: camera pulls away from carriage revealing the boles overland sign and wider intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive the carriage away from the camera position toward the town center

notable_agents.action: parked stationary carriage near the brick warehouse entrance

entered.detail: ornate black sign with 'BOLES OVERLAND' text in gold lettering
red brick industrial building with arched windows and green trim

segments.scene_description: The camera pulls away from the Davis Overland carriage, revealing a black ornate sign reading 'BOLES OVERLAND' in the foreground. A red brick warehouse with arched windows becomes visible on the left, and another parked carriage sits near its entrance. The Davis Overland carriage continues moving away into the town intersection as the camera focuses on the sign and surrounding street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a close-up of draft horses and transitions into a wide view of a bustling Western town intersection. It begins with a frontal view of the horses harnessed to a carriage on a cobblestone street, tracking forward as they move past a wooden station building and its platform bench. As the carriage gains momentum, the camera circles to the side to reveal the ornate red Davis Overland Despatch Co stagecoach with its gold lettering, causing the horses to be occluded by the carriage body. The scene then shifts as the camera pulls away from the moving vehicle, bringing a black Boles Overland sign into the foreground while a red brick warehouse with arched windows emerges on the left. Finally, the Davis Overland carriage recedes into the distance toward the town intersection, leaving the camera to focus on the surrounding street and parked carriages.
